headline: SK Hynix Joins the Nasdaq. But This Nasdaq-100 Semiconductor Stock Could Be an Even Better Buy for the Second Half of 2026.
summary: ASML's lithography machines are needed to manufacture advanced logic and memory chips for AI workflows.

headline: Why Western Digital (NASDAQ:WDC) Is Benefiting From AI-Driven Storage Demand and Tight HDD Supply Conditions
summary: Western Digital Corporation (NASDAQ:WDC) is one of the best performing AI stocks over the last 3 years, with a 3Y CAGR of 173%. On June 15, Morgan Stanley analyst Erik Woodring maintained an Overweight rating and raised his price target to $650 from $488. Woodring’s thesis centered on a widening hard-disk-drive shortage. He estimated demand […]
